candidates.description: Iteration-1 student candidate (v0.2.0) — the pre-coaching baseline for this iteration.
candidates.predicted_judge_response: Strong on all five engineer-review dimensions. Weak on output-contract clarity (items 2 vs 6) and blocker-first scope.
candidates.reflection: Used as the starting point for iteration-2 narrow pass.

candidates.description: Iteration-2 student candidate (v0.3.0) — four teacher coaching points applied as a narrow clarity-and-precedence pass.
candidates.predicted_judge_response: Strong pass on all five engineer-review dimensions and all four coaching points. Judge-mode precedence rule is the strongest new signal. Before-you-start preamble makes reference reading procedural.
candidates.reflection: Minimal diff from v0.2.0. All changes are targeted and justified by teacher critique. No unintended scope expansion.

candidates.description: Adversary findings for v0.3.0 — 3 high-severity, 3 medium-severity. Not a revised candidate; findings are deferred to a future iteration.
candidates.predicted_judge_response: Findings are credible and would strengthen the contract if addressed, but they do not invalidate v0.3.0 as the current best candidate.
candidates.reflection: Ghost-resume, fit-for-purpose bypass, and paraphrase-holdout are the three most actionable findings for iteration-3.
candidates.selection_notes: Deferred. No immediate impact on current candidate selection.
